mapper.select:
SELECT A.ID, A.SERVICE_NM, A.SHORT_CD, A.PROCESS_NMS, A.REMARK, A.CREATE_BY, A.CREATE_BY_NAME, A.CREATE_TIME, A.UPDATE_BY, A.UPDATE_BY_NAME, A.UPDATE_TIME, A.IN_OUT, A.IN_OUT_STORAGE, (select LISTAGG ( WORK_PROCESS_CD, ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY WORK_PROCESS_CD ) from t_bus_service_process where BUS_SERVICE_GID=A.id) PROCESS_STR FROM t_bus_service A
A.id =#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_bus_service(ID, SERVICE_NM, SHORT_CD, PROCESS_NMS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, IN_OUT, IN_OUT_STORAGE) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{serviceNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shortCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processNms,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{inOut,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inOutStorage,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_bus_service SET SERVICE_NM = #{serviceNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHORT_CD = #{shortCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_NMS = #{processNms,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, IN_OUT = #{inOut,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IN_OUT_STORAGE = #{inOutStorage,jdbcType=INTEGER}
ID = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_bus_service_process ( BUS_SERVICE_GID, WORK_PROCESS_CD )
SELECT #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM dual
